subject: F1000Research in PubMed; Happy new year from F1000!
body:
To ensure you receive emails from Faculty of 1000, add info@updates.f1000.com to your safelist.

-----------------------------------------------------

Faculty of 1000 |  http://f1000.com                
Monthly Update  |  January 2014 

-----------------------------------------------------

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 
 F1000Research peer-reviewed articles now visible on PubMed and PubMed Central     
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 

The first set of articles to have been published and passed peer-review in F1000Research [ http://f1000research.com/ ] is now visible in PubMed [ http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed ] and PubMed Central (PMC) [ http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/ ]. From now on, all our articles will be deposited here as soon as they pass peer review.

We have worked closely with the National Library of Medicine (NLM) [ http://www.nlm.nih.gov/ ] to ensure the additional article information captured via our unique publishing model (corresponding referee reports, author responses and underlying data) is accessible in PMC. The inclusion of the referee reports in PMC should help to provide referees with increased visibility and credit for the time taken in providing referee reports.

Find out more in our blog post [ http://blog.f1000research.com/2013/12/12/f1000research-now-visible-on-pubmed-and-pubmed-central/ ]. 

 

   F1000Prime                             
==================

1,340 recommendations  [ http://f1000.com/prime/search/evaluations ] added in the past month. Below is a selection:  

Brain detox      
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718147564?key=Sip2fvynKevd67N ]   
Evidence from a mouse study that sleep flushes out injurious metabolites from the adult brain by enhancing the flow of interstitial fluid.      
Xie L, Kang H, Xu Q et al.   
Science. 2013; 342:373-7   

What does pain look like?    
[ http://f1000.com/prime/717999439?key=PYW1qGfPiN1Sshd ]   
Pain is subjective, but a controversial article suggests that an objective neural signature for pain may exist in brain activation patterns viewed via fMRI.    
Wager TD, Atlas LY, Lindquist MA et al.   
N Engl J Med. 2013; 368:1388-97

No salt please    
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718133765?key=EaJd5wWC1mwiy6S ]    
These very simple experiments in plants show a new type of tropism -- halotropism -- whereby plant roots avoid salty environments.    
Galvan-Ampudia CS, Julkowska MM, Darwish E et al.   
Curr Biol. 2013; 23:2044-50   

* F1000Prime Reports *  

Open-access review journal [ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/ ], reporting on the hottest topics.

Advances in treating psoriasis    
[ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/m/6/04 ]    
New and better therapies for psoriasis and psoriatic arthritis are headed for the clinic.    
F1000Prime Report by Belge K, Brück K, Ghoreschi K [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/9641802225493883 ].   
F1000Prime Rep 2014, 6:4   

 ---------------
 See all recent F1000Prime Reports          
 >> http://f1000.com/prime/reports/                 
 ---------------   
    


~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
 F1000 Specialist programme     
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
If you would like to get better connected with Faculty of 1000, please join our network of F1000 Specialists. More details here [ http://f1000.com/specialists ].

 ---------------
 Apply now
 >> http://f1000.com/specialists 
 ---------------
 


   F1000Research                      
======================

Our innovative open access journal [ http://f1000research.com/ ] offering rapid publication, open peer review and open data.

Below is a selection of our latest peer reviewed articles:  


OPINION ARTICLE
Are we divorced from the species we study? [ http://f1000research.com/articles/2-254/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/2cr ]   
Latest Published: 22 Nov 2013   
Smith DR.   
F1000Research 2:254   

SHORT RESEARCH ARTICLE
Cladonia lichens on extensive green roofs: evapotranspiration, substrate temperature, and albedo [ http://f1000research.com/articles/2-274/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/2ha ]   
Published: 16 Dec 2013   
Heim A, Lundholm J.   
F1000Research 2:274   

SHORT RESEARCH ARTICLE
A novel role for syndecan-3 in angiogenesis [ http://f1000research.com/articles/2-270/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/2g6 ]   
Published: 09 Dec 2013   
De Rossi G, Whiteford JR.   
F1000Research 2:270   

RESEARCH ARTICLE
A computational analysis of the long-term regulation of arterial pressure [ http://f1000research.com/articles/2-208/v2 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/2hm ]   
Latest Published: 06 Dec 2013
Beard DA, Pettersen KH, Carlson BE et al.   
F1000Research 2:208


 ---------------------------------------------
  Submit now to F1000Research          
  >> http://f1000research.com/author/submit        
 ----------------------------------------------


   F1000Trials                     
==================

A comprehensive listing [ http://f1000.com/trials ] of clinical trial articles reviewed by the F1000 Faculty, with the most important tagged as recommended.

Below is a taster of F1000Trials content. To read, please sign-in [ http://f1000.com/trials/signin ] or register for free [ http://f1000.com/trials/register ]:  

Hope for HCV    
[ http://f1000.com/trials/718170953?key=ivz2Er0iPp8v7x3 ]   
HCV-associated end-stage liver disease will reach its peak over the next 10 years, but new treatment options for difficult-to-treat patients are on the horizon.   
Lawitz E, Poordad FF, Pang PS et al.    
Lancet. 2013; S0140-6736(13)62121-2

What's in a name?    
[ http://f1000.com/trials/718192275?key=9unniNWUsZPSN25 ]  
An RCT looks at the language used to describe palliative services for advanced cancer patients and whether it affects their views.   
Maciasz RM, Arnold RM, Chu E et al.   
Support Care Cancer. 2013; 21:3411-9   

Competing comorbidities 
[ http://f1000.com/trials/718123161?key=nYEmtL0suGUCxlI ]    
This work on whether comorbid anxiety disorders moderate the effects of bipolar disorder psychotherapy "shows the importance of treating comorbidities adequately".    
Deckersbach T, Peters AT, Sylvia L et al.      
Am J Psychiatry. 2013; [Epub ahead of print]       

    
    F1000Posters                 
======================
 
Open Repository [ http://f1000.com/posters ] for posters and slide presentations; completely free to view and submit. Below are a few selections:

* ECOLOGY *

Calcareous sponges are fashion    
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1094681 ]
Padua A, Fonseca CA, Silva-Ferreira TCG et al.   
F1000Posters 2013, 4:1377   

* COMPUTATIONAL BIOLOGY *

Biomedical text mining for disease-gene discovery    
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1094863 ]
ElShal S, Davis J, Moreau Y.
F1000Posters 2013, 4:1516

* ANESTHESIOLOGY & PAIN MANAGEMENT *

Pharmacokinetic modeling for optimization of opioid dosing regimens    
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1094570 ]
Linares O, Daly D, Stefanovski D et al.   
F1000Posters 2013, 4:1298

 ----------------------------------------------
  Deposit now        
  >> http://f1000.com/posters/fordepositors      
 ---------------------------------------------- 
 
  
----------------------

 * F1000Tips *

Follow @F1000Tips on Twitter [ http://twitter.com/f1000tips ] for tips, tricks, and customer support for all Faculty of 1000 service.

---------------------- 

-----------------------------------------------------   

In addition to this Monthly Update, we also send out emails featuring deals and discounts for registered users. To sign up, registered users should visit MyF1000 via any F1000 product and opt-in to receive "Information from F1000 about special offers" (under Email Alerts).

You have received this message because you asked to receive the F1000 Monthly Update to your registered email address from Faculty of 1000. If you do not wish to receive any further such messages, you may unsubscribe [ http://www.f1000.com/unsubscribe/email?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&emailAlertType=MONTHLY_UPDATES ] at any time. For further information or enquiries please contact Customer Services at info@f1000.com [ mailto:info@f1000.com ].

Faculty of 1000 Ltd | Science Navigation Group
Registered in England and Wales with Company Number 3739756
Middlesex House, 34-42 Cleveland Street | London, W1T 4LB | United Kingdom
